questions: how to be a good host?
answers: Hospitality is the business of welcoming and serving guests with warmth and care. It includes hotels, restaurants, tourism, and event management industries.
Hospitality holo guests ke welcome kora ar serve kora. Hotel, restaurant, tourism — sob hospitality er part. Ei industry te communication ar people skills onek important.
Key hospitality skills include excellent communication, problem-solving, attention to detail, patience, cultural awareness, and a genuine desire to make people feel comfortable and valued.

To be a good host, anticipate your guests' needs, make them feel welcome, offer food and drinks, be attentive but not overbearing, and create a comfortable atmosphere. Small gestures make the biggest impact.
